---
title: "Clusters & Cloud GPU"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Clusters & Cloud GPU

## Providers Cloud

### Hyperscalers

| Provider | GPU disponibles | Pricing H100 (on-demand) | Spécificités |
|----------|----------------|--------------------------|--------------|
| AWS | H100, H200, B200 (P5e/P6) | ~$3.50/h (spot) / $12.99/h | EC2, EFA interconnect |
| GCP | H100, TPU v5p, Trillium | ~$3.67/h (spot) / $11.77/h | TPU exclusif, A3 Mega |
| Azure | H100, H200, B200 | ~$3.67/h (spot) / $12.24/h | ND H100 v5, InfiniBand |
| OCI | H100, H200 | ~$2.95/h (spot) | Moins cher, moins de stock |

### Providers Spécialisés

| Provider | GPUs | Pricing | Spécificités |
|----------|------|---------|--------------|
| Lambda Labs | H100, A100, RTX 6000 | ~$2.49/h (H100) | Simple, SSH direct |
| RunPod | H100, A100, RTX 4090 | ~$2.39/h (H100 spot) | Serverless, Pods |
| Modal | H100, A100 | Per-second | Serverless Python |
| Replicate | H100 | Per-second | Model deployment |
| Together AI | H100 | Per-token | Fine-tuning + inference |
| Fireworks AI | H100 | Per-token | Inference optimized |
| CoreWeave | H100, H200, B200 | ~$2.23/h (H100) | NVIDIA partner, large scale |
| Crusoe | H100 | ~$1.50/h (spot) | Flare gas powered |

## Orchestration de Cluster

### Slurm (HPC traditionnel)

- Standard pour les clusters académiques et HPC
- File de priorité, allocation multi-GPU
- Compatible avec NCCL pour distributed training

### Kubernetes + GPU

- **NVIDIA GPU Operator** — automatise driver, CUDA, MIG
- **Volcano** — batch scheduling pour ML
- **KubeRay** — Ray on Kubernetes pour distributed inference

### Ray

- **Ray Serve** — inference distribuée, autoscaling
- **Ray Data** — preprocessing pipeline
- **Ray Train** — distributed training
- Compatible vLLM, SGLang pour serving

## Inférence à grande échelle

### vLLM

- PagedAttention pour gestion mémoire efficace
- Continuous batching
- Tensor parallelism (multi-GPU)
- Support: AWQ, GPTQ, FP8, INT4

### SGLang

- RadixAttention pour prefix caching
- Structured generation (JSON, regex)
- Multi-LoRA serving
- Plus rapide que vLLM sur certains workloads

### TensorRT-LLM

- Optimisations NVIDIA spécifiques
- In-flight batching, quantization INT4/FP8
- Best performance sur H100/H200

::: callout-tip
## Choix inference engine
- **vLLM** — standard de facto, large compatibilité
- **SGLang** — best pour structured output + prefix caching
- **TensorRT-LLM** — best perf sur NVIDIA, mais lock-in
- **Ollama** — dev local, simplicité
:::
